description: Staged analyzer-rule candidates derived from the Definitive Guide enrichment. These are NOT merged into analyzer-rules.json. They carry mixed detectability (regex | heuristic | model_metadata | ast_required | human_review) and must be reviewed before any are promoted to the live rule set. Only candidates with future_phase='analyzer_v1' are promotion targets; 'analyzer_v2' and 'human_guidance_only' stay staged.
scope: Slice 1 — evaluation context, row/filter context, context transition, CALCULATE evaluation order, predicate vs table filters, replace vs intersect, KEEPFILTERS, REMOVEFILTERS/ALL, USERELATIONSHIP/CROSSFILTER/TREATAS. Slice 2 — function semantics (return type, blank handling, grouping functions, TI scalar-vs-table). Slice 3 — engine internals / performance diagnostics (SE vs FE, callbacks, cardinality).

promotion_policy.analyzer_v1: static, low false-positive: candidate for promotion to analyzer-rules.json after review
promotion_policy.analyzer_v2: needs AST or query-plan/visual context: keep staged
promotion_policy.human_guidance_only: judgment call: never auto-enforced; used as review narrative

candidates.title: Computed/predicate filter replaces instead of intersects
candidates.suggested_fix: Wrap the filter in KEEPFILTERS when the user's existing selection on that column must persist.

candidates.title: Predicate's implicit ALL(column) likely unintended
candidates.suggested_fix: Confirm whether the column filter should be cleared; use KEEPFILTERS or restructure if intersection was intended.

candidates.title: Measure correctness depends on an unstated filter-context assumption
candidates.suggested_fix: Document the intended context; verify against the actual visual placement.

candidates.title: Row-context reference assumed to cross-filter another table
candidates.suggested_fix: Use RELATED/RELATEDTABLE or trigger context transition (measure/CALCULATE) to filter the related table.

candidates.title: ALL vs ALLSELECTED scope mismatch (percent-of-total)
candidates.suggested_fix: Use ALLSELECTED for the visible total, ALL for the grand total; pick deliberately.

candidates.title: Measure iterated at fact grain (context transition per row)
candidates.suggested_fix: Iterate the relevant dimension or use column arithmetic / a single CALCULATE.

candidates.title: FILTER(whole table) where a column predicate suffices
candidates.suggested_fix: Use a column predicate, or FILTER(VALUES(col), ...) on the smallest column.

candidates.title: Per-row IF/measure inside an iterator forces callbacks
candidates.suggested_fix: Hoist invariant subexpressions into VARs outside the iterator; restructure so the condition is a column filter and the inner expression is pure column math.

candidates.title: Over-broad ALL/table filter clears more than intended
candidates.suggested_fix: Clear specific columns with REMOVEFILTERS(col) or keep survivors with ALLEXCEPT.

candidates.title: Role-playing date not activated with USERELATIONSHIP
candidates.suggested_fix: Wrap the measure in CALCULATE(..., USERELATIONSHIP(factDate, 'Date'[Date])).

candidates.title: Bidirectional relationship used as a default
candidates.suggested_fix: Keep single-direction; apply CROSSFILTER per-measure or model with TREATAS.

candidates.title: High-cardinality calculated column hurts compression
candidates.suggested_fix: Split datetime into date/time, reduce decimal precision, push to ETL, or compute as a measure; drop unused columns.

candidates.title: Disconnected/config table applied without TREATAS/correct lineage
candidates.suggested_fix: Apply the disconnected table via TREATAS onto the target model column.

candidates.title: Time-intelligence function used in the wrong return-type slot (scalar vs table)
candidates.suggested_fix: Use table TI funcs (ENDOFMONTH/DATESYTD/DATEADD) only as CALCULATE filters; use scalar date funcs (EOMONTH/EDATE) in scalar/row expressions.

candidates.title: Measure/expression computed inside SUMMARIZE instead of ADDCOLUMNS
candidates.suggested_fix: Use SUMMARIZE only to group; compute expressions with ADDCOLUMNS over the grouping (or use SUMMARIZECOLUMNS).

candidates.title: IF(HASONEVALUE, VALUES) idiom replaceable by SELECTEDVALUE

promotion_log: 2026-06-26: 10 analyzer_v1 candidates promoted into analyzer-rules.json (see promoted_to). Remaining staged: analyzer_v2 + human_guidance_only.
